# Reproducibility and data availability {#sec-reproducibility}

::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Claude Code/Opus 4.8). Scaffold — to be completed before release.
:::

*[Scaffold]*

- **Code and data** — repository location and a persistent identifier; the central data schema (`data_variables.py`).
- **Environment** — `environment.yml`, package versions, random seeds.
- **Archived posteriors** — the per-model `trace.nc`, so results can be re-summarised without re-fitting.
- **Fit commands** — `scripts/fit_statistical_model.py {id} --config reporting`, `scripts/compare_statistical_models.py`.
- **Validation** — fake-data / simulation-based calibration status (@sec-methods).
- **Licensing** — code AGPL-3.0; documentation and data CC BY 4.0.
